title: leucanthemum praecox var. autumnale
intro: Leucanthemum praecox var. autumnale, also known as autumnal oxeye daisy, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Leucanthemum praecox var. autumnale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
